prompt: A photorealistic urban advertisement poster featuring a young Japanese woman in streetwear doing a deep squat in the middle of a busy crosswalk. She wears a black beanie, a dark grey oversized hoodie, a chunky silver chain necklace, olive green cargo pants, and chunky beige and black sneakers. She is holding out exactly two identical energy drink cans towards the camera; the cans are silver and black with a prominent yellow lightning bolt logo and the word ENERGY. The background is a blurred, bustling Tokyo street scene resembling Shibuya crossing with pedestrians and neon signs. The image features bold typography: large red vertical Japanese text on the left reading 新登場, white vertical Japanese text on the right reading ストリートま上げてく エナジー。, and a solid yellow horizontal banner across the bottom edge containing bold black text ENERGY DRINK alongside smaller Japanese text and a small black hand logo on the far right. Dynamic wide-angle perspective with a shallow depth of field.
